channel.title: Budget Build Bench
channel.description: Fresh takes for PC builders on a budget.

item.title: Ask the forge: your benchmarks questions, answered
item.description: Straight answers to the benchmarks questions PC builders on a budget keep asking, minus the hedging.

item.title: The quiet upgrade: small tweaks in upgrades with outsized returns
item.description: No purchases, no overhauls — the modest upgrades adjustments that PC builders on a budget report mattering most.

item.title: Myth vs. reality: best budget gpu 2026
item.description: The persistent myths around best budget gpu 2026, stress-tested against what PC builders on a budget actually report.

item.title: A weekend project: level up your gpus in two hours
item.description: One contained, satisfying gpus project for PC builders on a budget — start Saturday morning, done by lunch.

item.title: Community pulse: what r/buildapc is debating this week
item.description: The arguments, consensus shifts, and quietly useful threads from the benchmarks community this week.

item.title: The upgrades checklist: run this before you spend
item.description: Seven questions that separate a justified upgrades purchase from an expensive mood.

item.title: Five mistakes everyone makes in their first month of used parts
item.description: The most common early stumbles in used parts, and the cheap corrections that fix them for PC builders on a budget.

item.title: "used pc parts guide" in practice: a real-world field test
item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about used pc parts guide through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.

item.description: Straight answers to the benchmarks questions PC builders on a budget keep asking, minus the hedging.

item.description: No purchases, no overhauls — the modest upgrades adjustments that PC builders on a budget report mattering most.

item.title: Myth vs. reality: used pc parts guide
item.description: The persistent myths around used pc parts guide, stress-tested against what PC builders on a budget actually report.

item.title: The state of GPUs in 2026
item.description: A field report on gpus: where things stand, and what PC builders on a budget should do next.

item.title: Starter guide: Used Parts without the overwhelm
item.description: A practical on-ramp to used parts for PC builders on a budget — one repeatable workflow, no gear debt.

item.title: "best budget gpu 2026" — separating signal from noise
item.description: Thousands of people search "best budget gpu 2026" every month. Most of what they find is recycled. Here is what holds up.

item.title: Why PC builders on a budget are rethinking Upgrades
item.description: A quiet shift is underway in how PC builders on a budget approach upgrades — less maximalism, more maintenance.

item.title: Benchmarks on a budget: what actually matters
item.description: Where money changes outcomes in benchmarks — and the line items that are pure vanity.

item.title: What to watch next in Used Parts: five quiet shifts
item.description: Ignore the headlines — these are the slower currents reshaping used parts for PC builders on a budget.
